topic: Use of There (There is / There are / There was / There were / There will be)

questions.hindi: मेज पर एक किताब है।
questions.english: There is a book on the table.
alternatives: A book is on the table.
questions.hint: एक चीज़ है → There is + a/an + singular noun
questions.explanation: 'किताब' singular है, इसलिए There is use होगा। There is a book on the table.

questions.hindi: कमरे में दो कुर्सियाँ हैं।
questions.english: There are two chairs in the room.
alternatives: Two chairs are in the room.
questions.hint: दो चीज़ें → There are + plural noun
questions.explanation: 'कुर्सियाँ' plural है, इसलिए There are use होगा। There are two chairs in the room.

questions.hindi: फ्रिज में दूध है।
questions.english: There is milk in the fridge.
alternatives: There is some milk in the fridge.
questions.explanation: 'दूध' uncountable noun है, इसलिए There is use होगा। There is milk in the fridge.

questions.hindi: बाहर बहुत लोग हैं।

questions.hindi: थैले में कुछ सेब हैं।

questions.explanation: 'सेब' plural है और 'कुछ' = some use हुआ। There are some apples in the bag.

questions.hindi: घर के पास एक पार्क है।
